titleStmt.title: SII 40.329: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 329. (A.R. No. B. 378 of 1933.) Peddakomarla, Jammalamadugu Taluk, Cuddapah District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone lying in a field to the south-east of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1466, Krōdhi, Māgha, ba. 30.
Records a gift of land as mānya to Kandukūri Basivi Reḍḍi of Kōmerla by Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandyāla Timmayadēva Mahārāja, who enjoyed the nāyaṅkara of the Ghaṇḍikōta-sīma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu
svasti śrī jayābhyuda
ya śālivāhana śakavaru
ṣaṁbulu 1466 Agunēṭi krōdhi
saṁvatsara māgha ba 30 lu śrīmadrā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratā
pa śrī sadāsivadēva mahārāyalu vijaya
nagaramaṁdu ratna siṁhvāsanārūḍuṁḍaipṛ
thvi sāmrājyaṁ śeyucuṁḍagānu Ātrēyagō
trānvayalaIna śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara naṁdyāla ti
mayadēvamahārājulu komerala kaṁdukūri basivireḍḍi
kiveṭina mānyapu ceniki veIṁcina silaśāsanakramameṭlaṁnna
nu māku sadāsivadēvamahārāyalu nāyaṁkarānaku pā
liṁci Iccina ghaṁḍikōṭa sīmalōni pedakome¨rla cinakome
¨rla grāmālu reṁṭiki puṭu cēnu kaḍapa pōtireḍigāri pedda
cēni staḷaṁ kha 0~0 Akṣarālānu paṁdumu cēnu kaṁ
dukūri basivireḍḍiki mānyaṁ peṭitimi ganaka yī paṁdu
ṁcenunu kāṁpulu pālu paṁpulu paṭa panilēdu I
paṁdamu cēniki vaccina phalaṁ Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāIgānu
mī putrapautrapāraṁparyaṁgānu Anubhaviṁca
ṁvāru Ani veyiṁcina śāsanaṁ
śrī śrīṁ jēyunu
Digital edition of SII 40.329 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
